pi_items.source: Task description and verifier.py logic explicitly enforce this exact bandpass filter string.
Task description and verifier.py logic explicitly enforce a minimum bufferSize of 1800 seconds.
Task description and verifier.py logic explicitly require the recordstream.service to be sdsarchive.
Task description and verifier.py logic explicitly require the recordstream.source to be /home/ga/seiscomp/var/lib/archive.
Task description and export_result.sh explicitly set and check SCREENSHOT_PATH as /home/ga/scrttv_screenshot.png.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires the agent to configure SeisComP's scrttv application. I verified through the task description, setup scripts, and verifier.py logic that the expected target settings exactly match the metadata claims: the filter must be 'BW(2,0.5,8.0)', the bufferSize must be >= 1800 seconds, the recordstream service must be 'sdsarchive', the recordstream source must be '/home/ga/seiscomp/var/lib/archive', and the final screenshot must be saved to '/home/ga/scrttv_screenshot.png'. The environment uses real earthquake miniSEED data, typical of the SeisComP benchmark environments.
